title: CCR outcome-labeled comment corpus record
description: One record per Copilot Code Review (CCR) comment joined with its observed outcome. This is the CONTRACT for the evidence connector that Dreaming does not yet provide (capability gap G1/G2 in dreaming-skills-plan.md): the corpus lives in CCR's findings store (CosmosDB, keyed by repo/owner) + session telemetry, which is not reachable from a GitHub-MCP-only, firewalled Dreaming sandbox. Until that connector exists, ccr-self-learning runs against a pre-materialized export in this shape (one JSON object per line, JSONL).

comment_id.description: Stable id of the review comment.

repo.description: owner/name the comment was posted on.

category.description: CCR finding category, e.g. error-handling, naming, security-authz, style, tests, performance.

source.description: Who authored the comment. 'human' rows capture conventions humans enforce that CCR may have missed.

outcome.description: Labeled outcome. accepted=resolved-with-code-change; rejected=deleted/dismissed; ignored=outdated-without-change; engaged=human replied/discussed; superseded=replaced by a later comment.

outcome_evidence.description: How the outcome was determined, e.g. resolved-with-code-change, deleted, outdated, reply, reaction.

human_followup.description: Optional text of a human reply that enforces a convention (mined for 'convention' learnings).
